series_metadata.series_description: This series contains correspondence, authorizations, rates, rules, forms, cover letters and current year disapprovals.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Image retained superseded ; Paper: Hard copy retained microfilmed or imaged ; Microform: Microfilm retained superseded
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Wastepaper
